gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 with Max-Q Design
notes: Restarting a game 3 times causes the game to get stuck at loading screen, but music continues to play in the background. Doesn't quit using close button.
title: Act of Aggression - Reboot Edition

notes: Throws up an error on launch about windows media 9 codec, but you can just dismiss this message, press escape a couple of times on the black screen and get straight into the game.
title: Act of Aggression - Reboot Edition

notes: The game starts with a black screen, only the mousecursor is visible. Pressing the esc key several times will bring you to the game menu. Changing any the graphicsettings leads to a crash. The game runs with the standardsettings but looks really ugly.
title: Act of Aggression - Reboot Edition
